iotwireless.wirelessgateway.Description.Docs: The description of the new resource. The maximum length is 2048 characters.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.LastUplinkRe.Docs: The date and time when the most recent uplink was received.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.LoRaWAN.Docs: The gateway configuration information to use to create the wireless gateway.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.Name.Docs: The name of the new resource.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.Tags.Docs: The tags are an array of key-value pairs to attach to the specified resource. Tags can have a minimum of 0 and a maximum of 50 items.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.ThingArn.Docs: The ARN of the thing to associate with the wireless gateway.
